title: ophrys × ferruginea
intro: Ophrys × ferruginea, also known as the Bee Orchid, is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Ophrys ferrum-equinum and Ophrys sphegodes. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Ophrys × ferruginea include its ability to treat coughs, sore throats, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a natural remedy for wounds and skin conditions. The herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, although its use should be consulted with a medical professional before application.
